title: Narrative decomposition — block-shuffle gradation
verdict: H_flat CONFIRMED; primary declared prior H_mono FALSIFIED

hypothesis_adjudication.H_mono: FALSIFIED — k=2 median n_deep=1 < k=1 baseline=2; not monotone

key_findings: Block shuffling at k=2 and k=3 does not restore the deep conformal population above exp-091 sentence-shuffle baseline.
Total conformal count (median 9 both) matches exp-091 shuffled band; not recovering toward C-NAT (11-15).
Deep population remains at the sentence-shuffle floor: k=2 median=1, k=3 median=2.
L0 backbone remains stable (~7 heads per seed for k=3; k=2 s2 outlier at 8).
k=3 s1 had zero deep conformal heads (all 7 conformal in L0 only) — strongest single-seed H_flat confirmation.
k=2 s2 outlier (n_conf=11, n_deep=3): likely a lucky initialization, not a mechanism.
The minimum causal chain length for deep conformal formation is >3 sentences at this scale.
physical_interpretation: Whatever natural text provides beyond sentence-level reference and ordering is not restored by sentence-grouping at k=2 or k=3. The transition to deep conformal formation requires story-arc level sequential structure, not sub-segment coherence. Constrains the conformal induction mechanism: multi-hop reference tracking across sentence pairs is not the operative ingredient.
controls_note: Randomized-weights controls (k=2 seed-1200, k=3 seed-1300) launched 2026-07-22 ~11:15 AM MDT; results to be added when complete. Expected: 0/48 conformal, Δ_med≈0.1687 per prior controls.
next_experiment: exp-093 per pre-registration: half-story ordering (shuffle first and second halves of each story, preserving local coherence, destroying global narrative arc).
